name: omo
description: One Claude Code plugin namespace for Yeongyu's local Claude Code components.

interface.longDescription: OMO exposes the local Claude Code Rules, Comment Checker, LSP, Ultrawork, and Ultragoal components as one plugin namespace while keeping each component isolated under components/ for maintenance.
defaultPrompt: Use OMO LSP diagnostics on this workspace.
Show which OMO rules matched this file.
ulw: run this change with evidence.
